# Changelog

Display the Powerlines changelog.

## Usage

The `changelog` command can be executed using the following syntax:

<details>
<summary>Using npm:</summary>

```sh
npx powerlines changelog [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using yarn:</summary>

```sh
yarn exec powerlines changelog [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using pnpm:</summary>

```sh
pnpm exec powerlines changelog [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using bun:</summary>

```sh
bun x powerlines changelog [options]
```

</details>

## Options

The following options are available for the `changelog` command:

This command does not have any options.
